User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Bhartiya Swad platform, including both customers and administrators. This entity stores metadata about the user, customer insights, and their role within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and communication.

displayName.description: The public display name or full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user, determining access levels ('user' for customers, 'admin' for administrators).

totalOrders.description: The cumulative count of all orders placed by this user, used for customer segmentation.

totalMoneySpent.description: The total monetary amount spent by this user across all their orders, used for customer segmentation.

address.description: The primary delivery address for the user.

Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Represents a restaurant partnered with the Bhartiya Swad platform, offering food items to users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Restaurant entity.

name.description: The official name of the restaurant.

address.description: The physical address of the restaurant.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the restaurant.

email.description: The contact email address for the restaurant.

imageURL.description: The URL to the main image or logo of the restaurant.

averageRating.description: The aggregated average rating of the restaurant based on customer feedback.

totalOrders.description: The total number of orders received by this restaurant.

totalRevenue.description: The total revenue generated by this restaurant from all orders.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Categorizes food items (e.g., North Indian, South Indian, Fast Food) for easier browsing and filtering.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the food category (e.g., 'North Indian', 'Sweets').

description.description: A brief description of the types of food found in this category.

Food.title: Food
Food.description: Represents a single food item that can be ordered by users from a specific restaurant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Food entity.

name.description: The name of the food item.

description.description: A detailed description of the food item, including ingredients or preparation.

price.description: The current selling price of the food item.

imageURL.description: URL to the image of the food item for display.

rating.description: The average user rating for this specific food item.

trending.description: A flag indicating if this food item is currently marked as trending or popular.

isVeg.description: Indicates if the food item is vegetarian (true) or non-vegetarian (false).

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this food item belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Food)

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant that offers this food item. (Relationship: Restaurant 1:N Food)

totalOrders.description: The total count of times this particular food item has been ordered.

totalRevenue.description: The total revenue generated from the sales of this food item.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a complete order placed by a user, containing details about the customer, restaurant, and order status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed this order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant from which this order was placed. (Relationship: Restaurant 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including all items, taxes, and delivery fees.

status.description: The current processing status of the order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Preparing', 'Out for Delivery', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled').

deliveryAddress.description: The complete address specified for the delivery of this order.

customerNotes.description: Any special instructions or notes provided by the customer for this specific order.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single food item and its quantity within a larger order, capturing pricing at the time of purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item is a part of. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

foodId.description: Reference to the Food item that was ordered. (Relationship: Food 1:N OrderItem)

foodName.description: The name of the food item at the time the order was placed (snapshot for historical accuracy).

quantity.description: The quantity of this specific food item included in the order.

unitPrice.description: The price of a single unit of this food item at the time the order was placed (snapshot for historical accuracy).

subtotal.description: The calculated subtotal for this specific order item (quantity * unitPrice).

definition.description: Stores user profiles, including customer insights and roles. Users can read/write their own profiles. Admins can manage all user profiles. Includes denormalized 'totalOrders' and 'totalMoneySpent' for quick insights and customer segmentation. 'role' is present but primary admin authorization relies on `/admin_roles`.

Dedicated collection for secure admin role management. The mere existence of a document at this path for a given UID signifies admin privileges, ensuring Authorization Independence for security rules (DBAC: Existence over Content). Documents will typically only contain the 'uid' or a placeholder field. Only admins can create/delete these entries.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique user ID (UID) of the administrator.

definition.description: Stores details about all partner restaurants. Publicly readable by all users. Writable (add, edit, remove) only by administrators for management. Includes denormalized 'totalOrders' and 'totalRevenue' for performance tracking.
Stores food categories (e.g., North Indian, South Indian). Publicly readable by all users for filtering and browsing. Writable only by administrators for content management.

Stores individual food item details, including images, pricing, and category/restaurant references. Publicly readable by all users. Writable (add, upload images, set price/category/trending, edit, delete) only by administrators. Includes denormalized 'totalOrders' and 'totalRevenue' for top-selling item tracking.

Stores overall order information. Users can read their own orders (where `userId == request.auth.uid`). Administrators can read, update (e.g., status), and manage all orders for monitoring. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'restaurantId' for direct authorization and query filtering.

Stores individual items within a specific order as a subcollection. Access is dependent on the parent 'Order' document's authorization. Includes a snapshot of 'foodName', 'unitPrice' for historical accuracy.
